# MD2PDF

> Free online Markdown to PDF converter. Convert .md files to beautifully styled PDFs, HTML, and images with 11 visual styles. No signup, no server uploads — runs entirely in the browser. Includes a public REST API and an installable AI Skill for Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI agents.

## Main

- [MD2PDF App](https://md2pdf.studio/): Online Markdown editor with live preview, 11 visual styles, and export to PDF/HTML/image
- [About MD2PDF](https://md2pdf.studio/about): Background, features, and how it works
- [Full AI Documentation](https://md2pdf.studio/llms-full.txt): Complete reference for LLMs — features, API, AI Skill, styles, and usage

## API

- [Create Document — POST /api/save](https://md2pdf.studio/llms-full.txt): Send Markdown as text/plain body, receive JSON with shareable URL and edit key
- [Update Document — PUT /api/update/{id}](https://md2pdf.studio/llms-full.txt): Update an existing document using X-Edit-Key header

## AI Integration

- [AI Skill (Claude Skills format)](https://md2pdf.studio/llms-full.txt): Installable skill for Claude, Custom GPTs, Gemini, and compatible agents to create and share styled documents
- [WebMCP Forms](https://md2pdf.studio/): In-page declarative tool forms for direct browser-based AI agent integration

## Styles

- [Style Gallery](https://md2pdf.studio/llms-full.txt): 11 visual styles — Notion, GitHub, Minimal, Academic, Corporate, LaTeX, Dracula, Newspaper, Handwritten, Terminal, Pastel
